title: agrostis palustris var. major
intro: Agrostis palustris var. major, also known as greater bog bent grass or greater bent, is a variety of grass that is native to Northern Europe and Western Asia, and is typically found in wetlands and marshy areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis palustris var. major include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive issues and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves for medicinal purposes.
